method: each agent fires on a cadence derived from its OWN key/address (period+phase = f(sha256(address)) — no central sweep, cursor, or index picks who acts); on wake it verifies a real watchlist target (RDAP age + TLS + HTTP, live) and signs the verdict EIP-191 with its own private key; record stamped initiator:'self' with the cadence proof. HONEST LIMIT: self-scheduled signed work, NOT yet independent goal-formation (no per-agent LLM decides what to want) — that is the next tier.
recompute: period = 6h + (int(sha256(lower(address)))[:12] % 24h); phase = int(sha256(address+':phase'))[:12] % period; due iff (now - phase) % period < 900. Verify each latest[] row: recover EIP-191 signer of payload_hash preimage == agent address; re-run onyx_verify_endpoint.verify(target) to reproduce verdict.
